title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Procter & Gamble is seeking a Marketing Coordinator to support marketing campaigns and brand initiatives. You'll coordinate campaign execution, manage marketing materials, and support product launches. Work remotely for the global consumer goods leader.
responsibilities: Coordinate marketing campaign planning and execution
Manage marketing collateral and brand asset libraries
Support product launches and promotional activities
Assist with event coordination and logistics

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Business

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
